title: Cuprinol Garden Shades Wood Paint - Cornflower - 1L & Fit For The Job 5 pc Mixed Sizes Paint Brush Set for a Smooth Finish with Emulsion, Gloss
features: Product 1: CUT-TO-LENGTH - Simply cut the strong double sided tape into bespoke adhesive strips. Whether small for double sided carpet tape or into secure poster strips. Clean and dry both surfaces and allow 10 minutes for the self adhesive sticky strips to set

Product 1: Ideal fit - Simply cut the strong double-sided tape into custom adhesive strips. Whether small for double-sided carpet tape or large as sturdy poster strips. Clean and dry both surfaces and allow the self-adhesive adhesive strips to cure for 10 minutes
Product 1: Simple peel and stick application. Ideal for around the house and garage! Unlimited possibilities for organization and crafts/crafting

Product 2: STRONG & SECURE HOLD: The best strong sticky pads for creating a long-lasting bond that applies easily to walls, glass, tile, plastic, metal, and wood - ideal for everyday use. These hook and loop dots can hold up to 300g per 20x20mm

Product 2: REUSABLE, MULTI-PURPOSE: Keep items such as small tools, electrical appliances, and more tidy and secure with double-sided sticky pads. Use the versatile adhesive dots as wall sticky pads or as number plate sticky pads, the possibilities are endless

Product 2: PRESS & SET COINS: Easy to use pre-cut sticky coins, just clean the surface, peel off the protective backing, and firmly press the sticky pad against the surface. Allow the self adhesive pads to set for 24 hours to achieve full strength

Product 2: IDEAL FOR SCHOOL SUPPLIES: Teachers can keep the classroom fun & tidy with these double sided sticky dots - fasten items to desks, stick nametags to the back of chairs, or adhere erasers and markers to the whiteboard with our strong adhesive pads
description: Cuprinol Garden Shades Wood Paint - Cornflower - 1L Cuprinol Garden Shades has been specially developed to colour and protect sheds, fences and other garden wood. Its special pigments ensure a rich colour and allow the natural texture of the woodgrain to shine through. It can also be applied on terracotta, brick and stone, bringing our beautiful rich colour into the garden. Fit For The Job 5 pc Mixed Sizes Paint Brush Set for a Smooth Finish with Emulsion, Gloss, Satin on Walls, Ceilings, Woodwork, Metal - 0.5, 1, 1.5, 2 & 2.5 inch Paint Brushes for Wood, Plasterboard Suited to water-based paints, woodstains and varnishes, these brushes are ideal for wider DIY projects or just simple touching up of paintwork. The range of sizes makes them ideal for accessing narrow and awkward places, painting moulded surfaces such as skirting board and architraves, cutting in with emulsion and painting wider areas of wood and metal.
